	 Name Notes 
	Jian Yong’s family name may have originally been ‘Geng’ (耿), but in the Youzhou dialect ‘Geng’ it was pronounced ‘Jian’, so he changed it.

full_text:
Jian Yong (Xianhe) 簡雍 (憲和)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jian Yong (簡雍), styledXianhe (憲和), was born in Zhuojun. Trusted friend of Liu Bei, a wit and often used as envoy. Persuaded Liu Zhang to surrender. Jian Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
